Thank you for proposing changes for ORES-CORE! 🙌

**Important Note:** Everyone is welcome to propose modifications, additions, or improvements. However, please be aware that all proposals are subject to review, and **only the repository owner** has the authority to validate, approve, or deny them.

Make sure your Pull Request follows these guidelines so it can be easily reviewed.
-->

## 🏷️ Type of modification
<!-- Check the box corresponding to your modification with an 'x'. -->

- [ ] `[Material]` Modification / addition in `MaterialsDatabase.java`
- [ ] `[Item]` Modification / addition in `ItemType.java`
- [ ] `[Block]` Modification / addition in `BlockType.java`
- [ ] `[Texture]` Texture addition/modification (in `assets/ores/textures`)
- [ ] `[Config]` Vein generation addition/modification in `ConfigManager.java`
- [ ] Other (please specify): 

## 📝 Short explanatory text
<!-- Why is this modification necessary? What is its purpose? -->
<!-- Example: "Adding the Zinc material because it was missing to make alloys." -->

**Reason / Explanation:**


## 💻 Proposal description 
<!-- Briefly describe what the code does if it's not explicit, or add the image / texture here if applicable. -->

**Proposed changes:**


## ✅ Pre-Validation Checklist
- [ ] I have verified that the code compiles.
- [ ] I have respected the code architecture located in `common/src/main/java/ores/mathieu/...`
- [ ] If it is a dynamic texture, I have respected the `base_palette.png` color palette.
- [ ] (If applicable) I have tested the generation in-game (for Custom Veins) or the visuals (for Textures).
